DEFENDANT DOES NOT SHIFT THE BURDEN FOR SPECIAL INTERROGATORY IS INADEQUATE TO ESTABLISH A BASIS THAT PLAINTIFF LACKS EVIDENCE AS TO WHETHER THE PUMPS CONTAINED ORIGINAL OR REPLACEMENT PARTS. THERE IS A TRIABLE ISSUE OF FACT AS TO DEFENDANT'S UNDISPUTED FACT NUMBER NINE. DEFENDANT FAILS TO COMPLY WITH RULES OF COURT BY FAILING TO IDENTIFY SPECIFIC INTERROGATORY RESPONSES THAT ARE INADEQUATE. MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION IS DENIED FOR FAILURE TO DIRECT DISCOVERY TO DISTINCT CAUSES OF ACTION. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER. MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Jul-07-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT GOULDS PUMPS, INC'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT

Appearances:
Susan Kim of Crosby & Rowell, LLP (510-267-0300) for defendant and moving party
Paul Cook of Waters Kraus (310-414-8146) for plaintiff and responding party

Argued and the Court modified its ruling as follows: denied. Defendant failed to shift burden of proof. The Katherman deposition is evidence of decedent's exposure to defendant's product. Defendant does not shift the burden for special interrogatory is inadequate to establish a basis that plaintiff lacks evidence as to whether the pumps contained original or replacement parts. There is a triable issue of fact as to defendant's undisputed fact number nine. Defendant fails to comply with Rules of Court by failing to identify specific interrogatory responses that are inadequate. Motion for summary adjudication is denied for failure to direct discovery to distinct causes of action. Prevailing party to prepare a form of order. (302/PJM/PB) Judge: Patrick Mahoney; Reporter: Kimberly Jennings, CSR 11452
